name: set_this_player
details:
SYNOPSIS
void set_this_player(object | int);
   void set_this_user(object | int);

DESCRIPTION
set_this_player() causes 'who' to become the new value of this_player().  This efun is only available with __NO_ADD_ACTION__ defined, and is included since with __NO_ADD_ACTION__ parsing and dispatching of commands is the mudlib's responsibility. who can also be zero, in which this_player() is set to zero.

SEE ALSO
this_player(3)
category: 互动对象(玩家)相关函数（Interactive）
